title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management B2B SaaS company with HQ in Tel Aviv and offices in New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable owning executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models across globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, strong Salesforce expertise, experience scaling revenue operations at scale, and demonstrated cross-functional leadership. Tel Aviv hybrid location is ideal fit.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure at scale across B2B SaaS companies, with deep expertise in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional GTM alignment—exactly what Finout needs as you scale beyond $30M ARR. Your focus on cloud cost optimization resonates with my experience in data-driven revenue organizations, and I'm particularly drawn to building operational frameworks that connect Sales, Marketing, Finance, and Strategy in distributed teams. I'd welcome a conversation about how I can build and lead Finout's RevOps backbone.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render, a modern developer cloud platform for AI-native, full-stack applications, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations. The role requires 8–12 years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM Operations, ideally at a B2B SaaS company with a PLG motion layered with enterprise sales. The ideal candidate has proven experience building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. Render offers persistent compute, dynamic autoscaling, built-in orchestration, and observability so teams can ship and scale applications without managing servers.
score_reason: Excellent match on seniority (15+ years vs 8-12 required), RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and GTM operations. Render's AI-native developer platform and PLG+enterprise hybrid motion align perfectly with Omri's strong fit profile in AI-native GTM and pipeline forecasting.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps infrastructure for B2B SaaS companies navigating the exact motion Render is executing: PLG velocity layered with enterprise sales complexity. Your platform's focus on AI-native full-stack applications resonates with the GTM infrastructure needed to scale both motions simultaneously, and I'd be curious to discuss how you're thinking about pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV dynamics as you grow.
